name: papermind
description: PaperMind - Academic paper management and semantic research workspace.
author: PaperMind

scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm@10 run typecheck:app && corepack pnpm@10 run typecheck:main && corepack pnpm@10 run typecheck:service && corepack pnpm@10 run typecheck:extension && corepack pnpm@10 run typecheck:renderer
scripts.build:bundled-extensions: corepack pnpm@10 -C paperlib-entry-scrape-extension-main build && corepack pnpm@10 -C paperlib-metadata-scrape-extension-main build && corepack pnpm@10 -C paperlib-citation-count-extension-main build
scripts.build-mac-arm: corepack pnpm@10 run build:bundled-extensions && vue-tsc --noEmit && electron-vite build && electron-builder --config ./build_configs/electron-builder.mac.arm.json5
scripts.build-mac-x86: corepack pnpm@10 run build:bundled-extensions && vue-tsc --noEmit && electron-vite build && electron-builder --config ./build_configs/electron-builder.mac.json5
scripts.build-win: corepack pnpm@10 run build:bundled-extensions && vue-tsc --noEmit && electron-vite build && electron-builder --config ./build_configs/electron-builder.win.json5
scripts.build-linux: corepack pnpm@10 run build:bundled-extensions && vue-tsc --noEmit && electron-vite build && electron-builder --config ./build_configs/electron-builder.linux.json5
scripts.build-mac-arm-dev: corepack pnpm@10 run build:bundled-extensions && vue-tsc --noEmit && electron-vite build && electron-builder --config ./build_configs/electron-builder.mac.arm.dev.json5
scripts.build-mac-x86-dev: corepack pnpm@10 run build:bundled-extensions && vue-tsc --noEmit && electron-vite build && electron-builder --config ./build_configs/electron-builder.mac.dev.json5
scripts.build-win-dev: corepack pnpm@10 run build:bundled-extensions && vue-tsc --noEmit && electron-vite build && electron-builder --config ./build_configs/electron-builder.win.dev.json5
scripts.build-linux-dev: corepack pnpm@10 run build:bundled-extensions && vue-tsc --noEmit && electron-vite build && electron-builder --config ./build_configs/electron-builder.linux.dev.json5
